'''''Redhawk''''' was a [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] [[Bulk cruiser/Legends|bulk cruiser]] affiliated to the mercenary base [[Azzameen Station/Legends|''Falcon's Nest'']].

After the mercenary assault against the ''[[Tal'cara]]'', the mercenary base was sought. After interrogation of a captive by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], he gave the information that ''Redhawk'' was to rendezvous at the mercenary base.

''[[Otana/Legends|Otana]]'' met and boarded ''Redhawk''. [[Aeron Azzameen|Aeron]] infiltrated the ship and [[Slicer/Legends|sliced]] its charts to find the coordinations of the base. However a mistake led them to a weapons testing center in the [[Carida system/Legends|Carida system]].

''Redhawk'' was seen again later parked near the ''Falcon's Nest'', when the Azzameens realized it was actually their home.

In the [[Battle_of_Azzameen_Station|next assault]] of the Rebel Alliance in order to secure the station, ''Redhawk'' was destroyed.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
